question: Which teachers have taught the student with the earliest transcript issuance? List the teacher details.
sql: SELECT Teachers.teacher_id, Teachers.teacher_details FROM Teachers JOIN Classes ON Teachers.teacher_id = Classes.teacher_id WHERE Classes.student_id IN (SELECT student_id FROM Transcripts WHERE date_of_transcript = (SELECT MIN(date_of_transcript) FROM Transcripts))

back_translation.intent: 查询教师及其详细信息，这些教师教授了在Transcripts表中最早日期的课程

semantic.reason: 原始问题询问的是哪些教师教授了最早发放成绩单的学生，而SQL反向翻译描述中仅筛选出最早日期的Transcripts记录，但未明确关联到具体学生，因此无法准确判断哪些教师教授了该学生。
